hypothesis: If we add linear combinations of CBM-learned, orthogonal property vectors to the hidden states of a frozen molecular LLM during generation, then the produced molecules will shift toward specified single- and multi-property targets with lower MAE/Best100MAE across in- and out-of-distribution settings without degrading validity, uniqueness, novelty, or synthesizability and will outperform ActAdd and fine-tuning baselines because target properties are linearly disentangled in the model’s intermediate activations.
